headline: Fairview Health Services Selects Workday to Modernize HR, Finance, and Supply Chain on One AI-Powered Platform
summary: Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY), the enterprise AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, today announced that Fairview Health Services has selected Workday's full suite of AI-powered HR, finance, and supply chain solutions to replace its aging business systems and build a more modern, flexible platform for its people and patient community.

headline: 3 Cash-Heavy Stocks We Approach with Caution
summary: A surplus of cash can mean financial stability, but it can also indicate a reluctance (or inability) to invest in growth. Some of these companies also face challenges like stagnating revenue, declining market share, or limited scalability.

raw.headline: 3 Cash-Heavy Stocks We Approach with Caution
raw.summary: A surplus of cash can mean financial stability, but it can also indicate a reluctance (or inability) to invest in growth. Some of these companies also face challenges like stagnating revenue, declining market share, or limited scalability.

headline: Software companies fight back against fears that AI will kill them
summary: March 12 () - Oracle's Mike Sicilia is the latest software CEO to wade in to the debate on whether artificial intelligence tools that heavily automate human tasks will mean the demise of his industry. His verdict was a resounding "no.

headline: Defense Lifts Moat Stocks As Tech Stumbles
summary: Moat Index gained 2.13% in February, outperforming the S&P 500 by nearly 3 percentage points as defensive rotation favored its equal-weighted, valuation-conscious approach.
